code:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """
    Convert a list of triples about airports (or related entities) into a single,
    fluent English sentence. All triples are combined into one complex sentence.
    """
    if not triples:
        return ""

    def _clause(t: Triple) -> str:
        subj = t.subject
        pred = t.predicate
        # Remove surrounding quotes from the object value for cleaner output
        obj = t.object.strip('"\'')

        # Basic predicate‑to‑phrase mapping
        mapping = {
            "cityServed": f"{subj} serves {obj}",
            "elevationAboveTheSeaLevel": f"{subj} is at an elevation of {obj} meters above sea level",
            "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInFeet": f"{subj} is at an elevation of {obj} feet above sea level",
            "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInMetres": f"{subj} is at an elevation of {obj} metres above sea level",
            "location": f"{subj} is located in {obj}",
            "operatingOrganisation": f"{subj} is operated by {obj}",
            "runwayLength": f"{subj} has a runway length of {obj} meters",
            "runwayName": f"The runway name of {subj} is {obj}",
            "country": f"{subj} is in {obj}",
            "isPartOf": f"{subj} is part of {obj}",
            "1stRunwayLengthFeet": f"{subj}'s first runway is {obj} feet long",
            "1stRunwaySurfaceType": f"{subj}'s first runway surface is {obj}",
            "3rdRunwayLengthFeet": f"{subj}'s third runway is {obj} feet long",
            "icaoLocationIdentifier": f"{subj} has ICAO identifier {obj}",
            "locationIdentifier": f"{subj} has location identifier {obj}",
            "iataLocationIdentifier": f"{subj} has IATA code {obj}",
            "nativeName": f"The native name of {subj} is {obj}",
            "leaderParty": f"The leader of {subj} belongs to {obj}",
            "capital": f"The capital of {subj} is {obj}",
            "language": f"The language of {subj} is {obj}",
            "leader": f"The leader of {subj} is {obj}",
            "owner": f"{subj} is owned by {obj}",
            "1stRunwayLengthMetre": f"{subj}'s first runway is {obj} metres long",
            "4thRunwaySurfaceType": f"{subj}'s fourth runway surface is {obj}",
            "5thRunwayNumber": f"{subj}'s fifth runway number is {obj}",
            "largestCity": f"The largest city in {subj} is {obj}",
            "4thRunwayLengthFeet": f"{subj}'s fourth runway is {obj} feet long",
            "1stRunwayNumber": f"{subj}'s first runway number is {obj}",
            "administrativeArrondissement": f"{subj} belongs to the administrative arrondissement {obj}",
            "mayor": f"The mayor of {subj} is {obj}",
            "2ndRunwaySurfaceType": f"{subj}'s second runway surface is {obj}",
            "3rdRunwaySurfaceType": f"{subj}'s third runway surface is {obj}",
            "runwaySurfaceType": f"{subj}'s runway surface is {obj}",
            "officialLanguage": f"The official language of {subj} is {obj}",
            "city": f"{subj} is a city in {obj}",
            "jurisdiction": f"{subj} falls under the jurisdiction of {obj}",
            "demonym": f"The demonym for {subj} is {obj}",
            "aircraftHelicopter": f"{subj} operates the helicopter {obj}",
            "transportAircraft": f"{subj} operates the transport aircraft {obj}",
            "currency": f"The currency of {subj} is {obj}",
            "headquarter": f"The headquarters of {subj} is {obj}",
            "class": f"The class of {subj} is {obj}",
            "division": f"The division of {subj} is {obj}",
            "order": f"The order of {subj} is {obj}",
            "regionServed": f"{subj} serves the region {obj}",
            "leaderTitle": f"The leader title of {subj} is {obj}",
            "hubAirport": f"{subj} has hub airport {obj}",
            "aircraftFighter": f"{subj} operates the fighter aircraft {obj}",
            "attackAircraft": f"{subj} operates the attack aircraft {obj}",
            "battle": f"{subj} participated in the battle {obj}",
            "5thRunwaySurfaceType": f"{subj}'s fifth runway surface is {obj}",
            "countySeat": f"The county seat of {subj} is {obj}",
            "chief": f"The chief of {subj} is {obj}",
            "foundedBy": f"{subj} was founded by {obj}",
            "postalCode": f"The postal code of {subj} is {obj}",
            "areaCode": f"The area code of {subj} is {obj}",
            "foundingYear": f"{subj} was founded in {obj}",
            "ceremonialCounty": f"{subj} is in the ceremonial county {obj}",
        }

        # Retrieve the basic phrase
        phrase = mapping.get(pred)
        if phrase is None:
            phrase = f"{subj} {pred} {obj}"

        # Special handling for locationIdentifier (more natural phrasing)
        if pred == "locationIdentifier":
            phrase = f"The location identifier for {subj} is {obj}"
        # Special handling for runway surface types (e.g., 1stRunwaySurfaceType)
        elif pred.endswith("RunwaySurfaceType"):
            ordinal_map = {
                "1st": "first",
                "2nd": "second",
                "3rd": "third",
                "4th": "fourth",
                "5th": "fifth",
            }
            ordinal_key = pred[:3]  # e.g., "1st"
            ordinal = ordinal_map.get(ordinal_key, ordinal_key)
            phrase = f"The {ordinal} runway at {subj} is made of {obj}"
        # Special handling for country to include definite article
        elif pred == "country":
            # Add "the" if the object doesn't already start with an article
            if not obj.lower().startswith(("the ", "a ", "an ")):
                obj_with_article = f"the {obj}"
            else:
                obj_with_article = obj
            phrase = f"{subj} is in {obj_with_article}"
        # Special handling for runwayLength to match expected wording
        elif pred == "runwayLength":
            phrase = f"The runway length of {subj} is {obj}"
        return phrase

    # Build clauses for all triples
    clauses = [_clause(t) for t in triples]

    # Combine into a single fluent sentence
    if len(clauses) == 1:
        return clauses[0] + "."
    else:
        return ", ".join(clauses[:-1]) + ", and " + clauses[-1] + "."

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
